heading: Service of process
label: 220312 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent in the District of Columbia to receive service of process for the corporation. Notice to or service on the agent, or mailed to the business address of the agent, is notice to or service on the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22031236:1205(b)., .Oct. 20, 1978Pub. L. 95–493, § 5(b)92 Stat. 1644The words “at all times” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “to receive” are substituted for “authorized to accept”, and the words “is notice to or service on” are substituted for “shall be deemed as service or notice upon”, for consistency in the revised title.
